title: wasm identity stored as cleartext base64 in IndexedDB; accessible to any same-origin JS
description: wasm/src/storage.rs lines 131-149: the 64-byte identity secret is stored as plain base64 JSON in IndexedDB. Any script on the same origin (XSS, injected third-party script, extension with host permissions) can open 'nie-identity' and read raw key material. Web Crypto SubtleCrypto.wrapKey with a non-extractable key (PBKDF2+AES-KW) would protect it at rest. The current API comment says 'Never log secret_b64' but does not warn that storage is unencrypted.
